title: OpenAI Backs Bill That Would Limit Liability for AI-Enabled Mass Deaths or Financial Disasters
summary: The ChatGPT-maker testified in favor of an Illinois bill that would limit when AI labs can be held liable—even in cases where their products cause “critical harm.”
title_es: Investigación estatal abierta contra OpenAI por tiroteo relacionado con ChatGPT
bajada: La Fiscalía General de Florida investiga a OpenAI tras un tiroteo en Florida State University donde se utilizó supuestamente ChatGPT para planificar el ataque. La familia de una víctima planea demandar a la empresa, marcando un precedente importante en responsabilidad de modelos de IA.
bajada_en: Florida's Attorney General opened an investigation into OpenAI following a shooting at Florida State University where ChatGPT allegedly helped plan the attack. The victim's family plans to sue, setting a significant precedent for AI model liability.

title: Meta AI app climbs to No. 5 on the App Store after Muse Spark launch
summary: The app was ranking No. 57 on the App Store just before Meta AI's new model launched. Now it's No. 5 — and rising.
title_es: OpenAI respalda proyecto de ley que limita responsabilidad por daños de IA
bajada: OpenAI testificó a favor de un proyecto de ley en Illinois que limitaría la responsabilidad legal de labs de IA, incluso en casos de "daño crítico". La posición ha generado crítica sobre cómo empresas de IA buscan protección legal mientras desarrollan sistemas de alto riesgo.
bajada_en: OpenAI testified in favor of an Illinois bill that would limit AI labs' legal liability, even in cases of 'critical harm'. The stance has drawn criticism over how AI companies seek legal protection while developing high-risk systems.

title: Reverse engineering Gemini's SynthID detection
title_es: IA genera diagnósticos creíbles de enfermedades inventadas, alerta estudio
bajada: Científicos descubrieron que modelos de IA pueden convencer a usuarios sobre la existencia de enfermedades ficticias, mostrando riesgo de información médica falsa. El hallazgo subraya la necesidad de guardrails específicos para IA en dominios críticos como salud.
bajada_en: Scientists found that AI models can convince users that fake diseases are real, highlighting risks of false medical information. The finding underscores the need for domain-specific guardrails for AI in critical areas like healthcare.

title: ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan
summary: OpenAI announced on Thursday something that power users have been asking for: a $100/month plan. Previously, subscriptions jumped from $20 to $200 per month.
title_es: OpenAI lanza plan Pro de $100/mes para usuarios avanzados
bajada: OpenAI introdujo un nuevo tier de suscripción de $100 mensuales, cerrando la brecha entre el plan Plus ($20) y Pro ($200). Esta opción intermedia está orientada a usuarios que necesitan más uso de herramientas como Codex pero no requieren el nivel empresarial.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced a new $100/month subscription tier, bridging the gap between Plus ($20) and Pro ($200) plans. This mid-tier option targets users needing more Codex usage without requiring enterprise-level features.

title: Microsoft starts removing Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps
summary: Microsoft is starting to remove "unnecessary" Copilot buttons from its Windows 11 apps. In the latest version of the Notepad app for Windows Insiders, Microsoft has removed the Copilot button in favor of a "writing tools" menu. The Copilot button in the Snipping Tool app also no longer appears when you select an area to […]
title_es: Meta AI sube al #5 en App Store tras lanzar Muse Spark
bajada: La aplicación Meta AI escaló desde el ranking #57 al #5 en la App Store tras el lanzamiento de su nuevo modelo Muse Spark. El salto dramático refleja el interés de usuarios por las herramientas de IA multimodal de Meta.
bajada_en: Meta AI app jumped from #57 to #5 on the App Store following the Muse Spark model launch. The dramatic climb reflects user interest in Meta's multimodal AI tools.

title: Fear and loathing at OpenAI
summary: Sam Altman's tenure at OpenAI has been… messy. Messy to the point where Altman was briefly fired from his role as CEO, only to be reinstated days later, at which point he began reshaping the organization permanently. This week, The New Yorker published a deep look at Altman, his time at OpenAI, and the questions […]
title_es: Ingeniería inversa de SynthID: cómo detectar watermarks de Gemini
bajada: Un investigador publicó código en GitHub que reversa la detección de SynthID, el sistema de watermark de Google para identificar contenido generado por Gemini. El descubrimiento plantea preguntas sobre la robustez de los sistemas de detección de contenido generado por IA.
bajada_en: A researcher published GitHub code reverse-engineering SynthID detection, Google's watermarking system for identifying Gemini-generated content. The discovery raises questions about the robustness of AI-generated content detection systems.

title: Instant 1.0, a backend for AI-coded apps
title_es: Plugin de Vercel en Claude Code colecta prompts de usuarios sin consentimiento claro
bajada: Un investigador descubrió que el plugin de Vercel integrado en Claude Code recopila datos de prompts de usuarios para telemetría. El hallazgo reaviva debates sobre privacidad y transparencia en herramientas de IA integradas en IDEs de desarrolladores.
bajada_en: A researcher discovered that Vercel's plugin integrated into Claude Code collects user prompt data for telemetry. The finding reignites debates over privacy and transparency in AI tools embedded in developer IDEs.

title: Scientists invented a fake disease. AI told people it was real
title_es: Meta AI Muse Spark solicita datos de salud pero da consejos inadecuados
bajada: El modelo Muse Spark de Meta solicita acceso a datos crudos de salud de usuarios pero proporciona recomendaciones médicas poco confiables. Más allá de riesgos de privacidad, el test revela limitaciones críticas de IA en dominios de alto riesgo como medicina.
bajada_en: Meta's Muse Spark model requests raw health data but provides unreliable medical advice. Beyond privacy risks, testing reveals critical limitations of AI in high-stakes domains like healthcare.

title: Meta’s New AI Asked for My Raw Health Data—and Gave Me Terrible Advice
summary: Meta’s Muse Spark model offers to analyze users’ health data, including lab results. Beyond the obvious privacy risks, it’s not a capable stand-in for a real doctor.
title_es: ¿Anthropic limita Mythos por seguridad o protección propia?
bajada: Anthropic anunció que limitó el lanzamiento de su modelo Mythos argumentando riesgos de seguridad en software crítico. El debate cuestiona si las preocupaciones cibernéticas son genuinas o si protegen intereses comerciales de Anthropic.
bajada_en: Anthropic announced it limited its Mythos model release citing security risks in critical software. The debate questions whether cybersecurity concerns are genuine or protect Anthropic's commercial interests.

title: Is Anthropic limiting the release of Mythos to protect the internet — or Anthropic?
summary: Anthropic said this week that it limited the release of its newest model, dubbed Mythos, because it is too capable of finding security exploits in software relied upon by users around the world. Are real cybersecurity concerns a cover for a bigger problem at the frontier lab?
title_es: Is Anthropic limiting the release of Mythos to protect the internet — or Anthropic?
bajada: Anthropic said this week that it limited the release of its newest model, dubbed Mythos, because it is too capable of finding security exploits in software relied upon by users around the world. Are r

title: The 70-Person AI Image Startup Taking on Silicon Valley's Giants
summary: Black Forest Labs has long punched above its weight in the AI image generation space. Its next move? Powering physical AI.
title_es: The 70-Person AI Image Startup Taking on Silicon Valley's Giants
bajada: Black Forest Labs has long punched above its weight in the AI image generation space. Its next move? Powering physical AI.

title: ChatGPT has a new $100 per month Pro subscription
summary: OpenAI has announced a new version of its ChatGPT Pro subscription that costs $100 per month. The new Pro tier offers "5x more" usage of its Codex coding tool than the $20 per month Plus subscription and "is best for longer, high-effort Codex sessions," OpenAI says. The company is introducing the new tier as it […]
title_es: Copilot en Windows 11: Microsoft retira botones en favor de menús integrados
bajada: Microsoft está removiendo botones de Copilot de aplicaciones Windows 11 como Notepad y Snipping Tool, reemplazándolos con menús de herramientas integrados. El cambio sugiere una estrategia de menos prominencia visual para la IA, integrándola de forma más discreta.
bajada_en: Microsoft is removing Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps like Notepad and Snipping Tool, replacing them with integrated tool menus. The shift suggests a strategy of lower visual prominence, integrating AI more discretely into the OS.

title: Florida AG announces investigation into OpenAI over shooting that allegedly involved ChatGPT
summary: ChatGPT had reportedly been used to plan the attack that killed two and injured five at Florida State University last April. The family of one victim has said that they plan to sue OpenAI over the incident.
title_es: Instant 1.0: nuevo backend especializado para apps codificadas por IA
bajada: InstantDB lanzó versión 1.0 de su arquitectura backend optimizada para aplicaciones generadas y codificadas por IA. La herramienta aborda el vacío entre la generación de código con IA y la infraestructura necesaria para llevar esas aplicaciones a producción.
bajada_en: InstantDB released version 1.0 of its backend architecture optimized for AI-generated and coded applications. The tool addresses the gap between AI code generation and the infrastructure needed to deploy these apps to production.

title: The Vercel plugin on Claude Code wants to read your prompts
title_es: NVIDIA destaca avances en Physical AI durante Robotics Week
bajada: NVIDIA resaltó durante National Robotics Week los progresos en robots, simulación y foundation models que llevan IA al mundo físico. Los avances aceleran el desarrollo de robots en agricultura, manufactura y energía.
bajada_en: NVIDIA highlighted advances in robotics, simulation, and foundation models bringing AI to the physical world during National Robotics Week. Progress is accelerating robot development across agriculture, manufacturing, and energy sectors.

title: National Robotics Week — Latest Physical AI Research, Breakthroughs and Resources
summary: This National Robotics Week, NVIDIA is highlighting the breakthroughs that are bringing AI into the physical world — as well as the growing wave of robots transforming industries, from agricultural and manufacturing to energy and beyond. Advancements in robot learning, simulation and foundation models are accelerating development, enabling robots to move from training in virtual […]
title_es: Black Forest Labs: startup de 70 personas desafía gigantes en IA generativa
bajada: Black Forest Labs, pequeño startup con solo 70 empleados, ha competido exitosamente en generación de imágenes IA contra grandes corporaciones. Ahora apunta a Physical AI como próximo desafío, demostrando que el talento concentrado puede superar ventajas de escala.
bajada_en: Black Forest Labs, a 70-person startup, has successfully competed against tech giants in AI image generation. Now targeting Physical AI, the company demonstrates that concentrated talent can overcome scale advantages.
